case_title: 3RE6 LLC VS. LA SOLAR GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 3RE6 LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LA SOLAR GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: ARA PETROSYAN] FILED BY PLAINTIFF 3RE6 LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LA SOLAR GROUP, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: ARA PETROSYAN] SERVED NOV-02-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LA SOLAR GROUP, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ERE6 LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ZACHERY WARD, ASSET MANAGER . DEFENDANT LA SOLAR GROUP, INC.IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
